comment: Österreichische Druckschrift (lesenlernen.at): 4 strokes. 1: left vertical top→bottom. 2: top-left DOWN diagonally to valley center (starts at top, same x as stroke 1 top). 3: valley center UP diagonally to top-right. 4: top-right vertical top→bottom.

strokes.comment: Left vertical: top-left down to bottom-left
Left diagonal: from top-left DOWN to valley center (starts at top, same start as stroke 1)
Right diagonal: from valley center UP to top-right
Right vertical: top-right down to bottom-right
